steps.title: Set up the linear equation
steps.content:
The librarian starts with 78 books. If each of $c$ children gets 4 books and 6 books are left over, the total is accounted for as:
$$78 = 4c + 6$$

steps.title: Solve for the number of children
steps.content:
Subtract 6 from both sides:
$$78 - 6 = 4c$$
$$72 = 4c$$
Divide both sides by 4:
$$c = 18$$
B is correct.
